title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Applied Sciences

Announcements

Applied Sciences Faculty Make-up Exam Right Application Form

02
						November

2022

Applied Sciences Faculty midterm exams will be held between 14.11.2022-25.11.2022.

Students who cannot attend the exams due to any excuse are required to fill out the form at the link below.

Students who request a make-up exam must fill out a different form for each exam they cannot attend.

The original make-up document must be delivered to the Dean's Office of the Applied Sciences Faculty within 3 working days after the application.

Make-up Exam Right Application Form
